channel.title: +mRNA on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +mRNA on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Curevac
item.description: Efficacy 47% efficacy. (40,000 volunteers in Latin America and Europe) Advantages keeping stable for months in a refrigerator.

item.title: Moderna vaccine
item.description: Synthetic mRNA-1273 for spike protein. Storage: -20 Deg up to 6 months Efficacy 94.1% efficacy. Shown effective about 40 days after injection. It is not doing much to reduce the asymptomatic ones. The mRNA vaccines give good robust antibodies but not the IgA antibodies coating the nasal passages.So,you still carry viruses and keep spreading. Both the Pfizer and Moderna vaccines are 10 times less effective against the South African variant

item.title: Pfizer-BioNTech
item.description: An mRNA vaccine Storage requirement at -70 C Efficacy ≥14 days after a single dose: 42% ≥7 days after the second dose: 86% Reduces mild/ severe cases by 95% 7 days after 2nd dose of vaccine; reduces infection by 90%. 100% efficacy in adolescents 91.3% efficacy even after 6 months. Immune response after mRNA vaccinations after 2 doses demonstrated good and safe antibodies 8 weeks later. The efficacy against mutants was slightly reduced.
